chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2520 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.20953/2024. 2. For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 06.02.2026. Mr. Mohsin Raza, Advocate holds brief for Ms. Zehra Sehr Vayani, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ Despite serious question of maintainability having been framed on the last date and time having been sought for preparation on the subsequent date, the matter has not been pursued since. Even today, Counsel for the Petitioner is not in attendance and someone held brief on her behalf. Under such circumstances, the Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
